article.description: — Karl-Anthony Towns scored 39 points and Landry Shamet added a career-high 36 points off the bench as the New York Knicks beat the Miami Heat 140-130 in an NBA Cup game on Friday night.
article.headline: Towns, Shamet power Knicks to a 140-130 win over Heat in NBA Cup game

images.caption: Knicks forward OG Anunoby exits Friday's game vs. the Heat early with a left hamstring strain.
images.name: OG Anunoby suffers hamstring injury in first quarter

article.linkText: Towns, Shamet power Knicks to a 140-130 win over Heat in NBA Cup game
article.story: NEW YORK -- — Karl-Anthony Towns scored 39 points and Landry Shamet added a career-high 36 points off the bench as the New York Knicks beat the Miami Heat 140-130 in an NBA Cup game on Friday night. Jordan Clarkson scored 25 points, Mikal Bridges had 15, and Josh Hart recorded his first triple-double of the season with 12 points, 12 rebounds and 10 assists as the Knicks posted a season-high point total. Jalen Brunson missed his first game of the season due to a sprained right ankle sustained in Wednesday’s loss to Orlando. OG Anunoby left the game after two minutes with a left hamstring strain and did not return. Norman Powell scored a season-high 38 points to lead the Heat. Jaime Jaquez Jr. had 23. Andrew Wiggins and Kel’el Ware scored 15 points apiece, while Pelle Larsson had 14 and Davion Mitchell 11. The Knicks and Heat are 1-1 in Group C play. The Knicks trailed 62-61 in the second quarter before Towns connected on consecutive 3-pointers and a pair of free throws. New York never trailed again and led 78-68 at halftime. Miami got within two at 104-102, but the Knicks held on for a 110-104 lead after the third quarter. After Jaquez hit a layup to open the final quarter, the Knicks responded with a 10-0 run and went on to take their biggest lead at 125-110 on Shamet’s 3-pointer with 6:55 left. Miami never got closer than eight points the rest of the way. The Heat had their biggest lead after scoring the first seven points of the game, and were ahead 35-32 after the first quarter. Up next The teams meet again in Miami on Monday. ------ AP NBA: https://apnews.com/hub/nba

images.caption: Victor Wembanyama and the Spurs continue to see their championship odds shift.

images.caption: The Celtics' title odds have shortened since Jayson Tatum's return last week.

images.caption: Led by Victor Wembanyama, the Spurs continue to see their NBA championship odds shorten.
images.name: Victor Wembanyama [1296x729]

images.name: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander [1296x729]

images.alt: Cleveland Cavaliers guard Donovan Mitchell (45) against the Phoenix Suns in the first half at Mortgage Matchup Center.

images.name: Donovan Mitchell [1296x729]

images.alt: Jaylen Brown #7 of the Boston Celtics shoots against the Portland Trail Blazers at TD Garden on January 26, 2026 in Boston, Massachusetts.
images.caption: The Celtics now have shorter odds to win the NBA title than the Spurs, Rockets, Knicks and Pistons.
images.name: Jaylen Brown [1296x729]

images.alt: Jamal Murray #27 of the Denver Nuggets dribbles the ball during the game against the Dallas Mavericks on January 14, 2026 at American Airlines Center in Dallas, Texas.
images.caption: Jamal Murray has led the Nuggets while Nikola Jokic recovers from injury.

videos.description: Miami Heat vs. New York Knicks: Game Highlights
videos.headline: Miami Heat vs. New York Knicks: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Miami Heat vs. New York Knicks: Game Highlights) 2025/11/15 ESHEET

videos.description: Karl-Anthony Towns drills two consecutive 3-pointers for the Knicks.
videos.headline: KAT knocks down back-to-back 3s

videos.description: Josh Hart fakes a drive and pulls up for a jumper just before time expires in the first half for the Knicks.
videos.headline: Josh Hart beats the halftime buzzer with smooth jumper

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Josh Hart beats the halftime buzzer with smooth jumper) 2025/11/15 ESHEET

videos.description: Jaime Jaquez Jr. drives straight to the hoop and lays it in for the Heat.
videos.headline: Jaime Jaquez Jr. gets to the tin in a hurry for a layup

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jaime Jaquez Jr. gets to the tin in a hurry for a layup) 2025/11/15 ESHEET

videos.description: Kel'el Ware scoops a loose ball and puts it in plus the foul.
videos.headline: Kel'el Ware shows his touch for a Heat and-1

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Kel'el Ware shows his touch for a Heat and-1) 2025/11/15 ESHEET

videos.description: Landry Shamet hits a tough 3-pointer from the corner for the Knicks.
videos.headline: Landry Shamet steps back into a 3

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Landry Shamet steps back into a 3) 2025/11/15 ESHEET

videos.description: Landry Shamet puts the ball through over Kel'el Ware for a Knicks bucket.
videos.headline: Landry Shamet rises for a poster dunk

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Landry Shamet rises for a poster dunk) 2025/11/15 ESHEET

videos.description: Landry Shamet beats Norman Powell to the rim and lays it in plus the foul.
videos.headline: Landry Shamet tiptoes the baseline for a Knicks and-1

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Landry Shamet tiptoes the baseline for a Knicks and-1) 2025/11/15 ESHEET

videos.description: Karl-Anthony Towns faces up and puts a 3-pointer through the basket.
videos.headline: KAT swishes a spot up 3 for the Knicks

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (KAT swishes a spot up 3 for the Knicks) 2025/11/15 ESHEET

videos.description: Josh Hart comes up with a loose ball and the Knicks work it around to an open 3-pointer for Mikal Bridges.
videos.headline: Knicks work the ball around for a Bridges 3

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Knicks work the ball around for a Bridges 3) 2025/11/15 ESHEET

videos.description: Karl-Anthony Towns hits back-to-back 3-pointers for his sixth of the half for the Knicks.
videos.headline: KAT scorching from 3

videos.description: Landry Shamet lays in a tough basket for the Knicks and the MSG crowd loves it.
videos.headline: Landry Shamet fired up after big bucket

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Landry Shamet fired up after big bucket) 2025/11/15 ESHEET

videos.description: Josh Hart gets up for the beautiful jam
videos.headline: Josh Hart gets up for the beautiful jam

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Josh Hart gets up for the beautiful jam) 2025/11/15 ESHEET

videos.description: Mikal Bridges turns defense into offense with a steal and 3-pointer for the Knicks.
videos.headline: Mikal Bridges picks off a pass and knocks down a 3

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Mikal Bridges picks off a pass and knocks down a 3) 2025/11/15 ESHEET

videos.description: Nikola Jovic finds Jaime Jaquez Jr. backdoor for an easy Heat basket.
videos.headline: Nikola Jovic sneaks a pass to Jaquez Jr. for the lay-in

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Nikola Jovic sneaks a pass to Jaquez Jr. for the lay-in) 2025/11/15 ESHEET
